title: brachyscome brownii
intro: Brachyscome brownii, also known as the Australian daisy, is a flowering plant that belongs to the daisy family and is native to Australia. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Brachyscome brownii include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma. Brachyscome brownii can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
